testcase.name: test_get_repair_rules_returns_96_rules

failure.message: AssertionError: Rule should have conditions assert 'conditions' in {'action_type': 'REPAIR', 'category_id': '97b12517-ecd2-48a8-bb0d-b3982f3964b0', 'category_name': 'Front Bumper Inspection', 'condition_type': 'EQUALS', ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_repairs_module.py:160: in test_get_repair_rules_returns_96_rules assert "conditions" in rule, "Rule should have conditions" E AssertionError: Rule should have conditions E assert 'conditions' in {'action_type': 'REPAIR', 'category_id': '97b12517-ecd2-48a8-bb0d-b3982f3964b0', 'category_name': 'Front Bumper Inspection', 'condition_type': 'EQUALS', ...}

testcase.name: test_rules_have_valid_conditions

failure.message: AssertionError: Rule 135efdbf-3e55-41bf-b98a-b6604cad50de should have at least one condition assert 0 > 0 + where 0 = len([])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_repairs_module.py:288: in test_rules_have_valid_conditions assert len(conditions) > 0, f"Rule {rule['id']} should have at least one condition" E AssertionError: Rule 135efdbf-3e55-41bf-b98a-b6604cad50de should have at least one condition E assert 0 > 0 E + where 0 = len([])
